executionArgs.additionalInstruction: Round 2 re-test after bug fixes. Backend API running on port 8000. Key changes since Round 1: (1) Added POST /api/submit-email endpoint, (2) Scrape endpoint now returns 500 for unsupported sources. Important: the manifest path is data/raw/manifest.yaml (not manifests/manifest.yaml). For ingest tests, use an existing PDF like data/raw/acts/bank_act.pdf or test error handling with a non-existent path. The GET /search endpoint requires query parameter in URL (not body).
